{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Titan Knight suit
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Kyri wears a [[Titan Knight suit]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9">''The Knight'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
